label: Stage end trigger (roles arrived)
description: Ends the stage when all specified roles have arrived at their positions (have the Arrived pawn tag set).

roleIds.label: Role IDs
roleIds.description: List of role IDs that must have the Arrived tag for this trigger to fire.

clearTag.label: Clear tag
clearTag.description: If true, removes the Arrived tag from role pawns when the trigger fires.

tag.label: Tag
tag.description: Pawn tag checked -- defaults to Arrived for this trigger subclass.
